data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a public review request after a positive survey. However, the evidence only describes a single rating question and follow-up quick-select options, without confirming the implementation of the public review request mechanism. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support the presence of this critical feature, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case's needs.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of a public review request after a positive survey.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
